name: bluerock
description: The plugin for BlueRock for Builders (builders.bluerock.io). Your workspace, trained on how you write — it runs your morning brief, tracks today's priorities, preps and recaps meetings, wraps up your sessions, and points an Account Research agent team at any company to hand you a sourced dossier in your voice. Drive it in plain language, or with /bluerock: commands.
